channel.title: manageengine — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by manageengine (manageengine).

item.title: CVE-2025-1723 · 8.1 HIGH — Account takeover
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versions 6510 and below are vulnerable to account takeover due to the session mishandling. Valid account holders in the setup only have the potential to exploit this bug.

item.title: CVE-2024-9097 · 3.5 LOW — IDOR
item.description: ManageEngine Endpoint Central versions before 11.3.2440.09 are vulnerable to IDOR vulnerability which allows the attacker to change the username in the chat.

item.title: CVE-2024-41140 · 8.1 HIGH — Improper Authorization
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 174000 and prior are vulnerable to the incorrect authorization in the update user function.

item.title: CVE-2024-52323 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Sensitive Data Exposure
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Analytics Plus versions below 6100 are vulnerable to authenticated sensitive data exposure which allows the users to retrieve sensitive tokens associated to the org-admin account.

item.title: CVE-2024-49574 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8123 are vulnerable to SQL Injection in the reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-10839 · 8.5 HIGH — XML External Entity
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine SharePoint Manager Plus versions 4503 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated XML External Entity (XXE) in the Management option.

item.title: CVE-2024-24409 · 8.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADManager Plus versions 7203 and prior are vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in the Modify Computers option.

item.title: CVE-2024-10203 · 7 HIGH — Agent Arbitrary File Deletion
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine EndPoint Central versions 11.3.2416.21 and below, 11.3.2428.9 and below are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Deletion in the agent installed machines.

item.title: CVE-2024-9459 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5718 and prior are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-36485 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8121 are vulnerable to SQL Injection in Technician reports option.

item.title: CVE-2024-48878 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADManager Plus versions 7241 and prior are vulnerable to SQL Injection in Archived Audit Report.

item.title: CVE-2024-5608 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8121 are vulnerable to SQL Injection in the technician reports feature.

item.title: CVE-2024-9100 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Local File Inclusion
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Analytics Plus versions before 5410 and Zoho Analytics On-Premise versions before 5410 are vulnerable to Path traversal.

item.title: CVE-2024-38868 · 7.6 HIGH — Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Endpoint Central affected by Incorrect authorization vulnerability while isolating the devices.This issue affects Endpoint Central: before 11.3.2406.08 and before 11.3.2400.15

item.title: CVE-2024-6204 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions before 5715 are vulnerable to SQL Injection in the reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-5546 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Password Manager Pro versions before 12431 and ManageEngine PAM360 versions before 7001 are affected by authenticated SQL Injection vulnerability via a global search option.

item.title: CVE-2024-41150 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: An Stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in request module affects Zohocorp ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus, ServiceDesk Plus MSP and SupportCenter Plus.This issue affects ServiceDesk Plus versions: through 14810; ServiceDesk Plus MSP: through 1480…

item.title: CVE-2024-38869 · 8.3 HIGH — Incorrect Authorization
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Endpoint Central affected by Incorrect authorization vulnerability in remote office deploy configurations.This issue affects Endpoint Central: before 11.3.2416.04 and before 11.3.2400.25.

item.title: CVE-2024-5586 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8121 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in extranet lockouts report option.

item.title: CVE-2024-5556 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-5490 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in aggregate reports option.

item.title: CVE-2024-36514 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in file summary option.

item.title: CVE-2024-36515 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in dashboard. Note: This vulnerability is different from another vulnerability (CVE-2024-36516), both of which have affected ADAudit Plus' dashbo…

item.title: CVE-2024-36516 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in dashboard. Note: This vulnerability is different from another vulnerability (CVE-2024-36515), both of which have affected ADAudit Plus' dashbo…

item.title: CVE-2024-36517 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8000 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in alerts module.

item.title: CVE-2024-5467 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8121 are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in account lockout report.

item.title: CVE-2024-5466 · 8.8 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager and Remote Monitoring and Management versions 128329 and below are vulnerable to the authenticated remote code execution in the deploy agent option.

item.title: CVE-2024-36034 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8003 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in aggregate reports' search option.

item.title: CVE-2024-36035 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8003 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in user session recording.

item.title: CVE-2024-36518 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8110 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in attack surface analyzer's dashboard.

item.title: CVE-2024-5487 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8110 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in attack surface analyzer's export option.

item.title: CVE-2024-5527 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 8110 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL Injection in file auditing configuration.

item.title: CVE-2024-5678 · 4.7 MEDIUM — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Applications Manager versions 170900 and below are vulnerable to the authenticated admin-only SQL Injection in the Create Monitor feature.

item.title: CVE-2024-6748 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager, OpManager Plus, OpManager MSP and RMM versions 128317 and below are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection in the URL monitoring.

item.title: CVE-2024-38872 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5717 and below are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in the monitoring module.

item.title: CVE-2024-38871 · 8.3 HIGH — SQL Injection
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine Exchange Reporter Plus versions 5717 and below are vulnerable to the authenticated SQL injection in the reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-38870 · 3.5 LOW — Stored XSS
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine OpManager, OpManager Plus, OpManager MSP and OpManager Enterprise Edition versions before 128104, from 128151 before 128238, from 128247 before 128250 are vulnerable to Stored XSS vulnerability in reports module.

item.title: CVE-2024-5471 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Agent takeover
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine DDI Central versions 4001 and prior were vulnerable to agent takeover vulnerability due to the hard-coded sensitive keys.

item.title: CVE-2024-27311 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Arbitrary file writing
item.description: Zohocorp ManageEngine DDI Central versions 4001 and prior were vulnerable to directory traversal vulnerability which allows the user to upload new files to the server folder.

item.title: CVE-2024-36038 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Stored XSS
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ITOM products versions from 128234 to 128248 are affected by the stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the proxy server option.

item.title: CVE-2024-27313 · 6.3 MEDIUM — XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine PAM360 is vulnerable to Stored XSS vulnerability. This vulnerability is applicable only in the version 6610.

item.title: CVE-2024-36037 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Insufficient Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 7260 and below allows unauthorized local agent machine users to view the session recordings.

item.title: CVE-2024-36036 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Insufficient Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions 7260 and below allows unauthorized local agent machine users to access sensitive information and modifying the agent configuration.

item.title: CVE-2024-27310 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — DOS Vulnerability
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus versions below 6401 are vulnerable to the DOS attack due to the malicious LDAP input.

item.title: CVE-2024-27314 · 2.4 LOW — Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus versions below 14730, ServiceDesk Plus MSP below 14720 and SupportCenter Plus below 14720 are vulnerable to stored XSS in the Custom Actions menu on the request details. This vulnerability can be exploited only by t…

item.title: CVE-2024-21791 · 4.7 MEDIUM — SQL Injection in ADAudit Plus
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 7271 allows SQL Injection in lockout history option. Note: Non-admin users cannot exploit this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2023-49335 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 7271 allows SQL injection while getting file server details.

item.title: CVE-2023-49334 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 7271 allows SQL Injection while exporting a full summary report.

item.title: CVE-2023-49333 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 7271 allows SQL injection in the dashboard graph feature.

item.title: CVE-2023-49332 · 8.3 HIGH
item.description: Zoho ManageEngine ADAudit Plus versions below 7271 allows SQL injection while adding file shares.
